criteria.description: WP01 Backend Checkout And Payment Core is reviewed and approved with checkout app routing, order delivery and LGPD fields, payment initiation, webhook processing, paid-order email confirmation, and processing-order expiration implemented.
criteria.evidence: WP01 approved after Docker checkout/orders tests passed with 38 OK and mercadopago import validation succeeded.
criteria.notes: Recorded in WP01 review evidence and status events. makemigrations --check still reports unrelated products migration drift.

criteria.description: WP02 Frontend Checkout Experience is reviewed and approved with checkout address form, CEP/address validation, LGPD consent gating, payment redirect, success/failure pages, processing status labels, and frontend checkout service/types coverage implemented.
criteria.evidence: WP02 approved after focused Jest tests passed 19/19, ESLint passed, and Docker Compose frontend production build passed.
criteria.notes: Recorded in WP02 review evidence and status events.

criteria.description: Mission-level backend and frontend validation gates passed before acceptance.
criteria.evidence: Backend checkout/orders validation, Mercado Pago import validation, frontend Jest coverage, ESLint, and production build were green during WP reviews.
criteria.notes: Acceptance evidence is based on the approved WP review records for this mission.
